violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Pipe was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils food prep container used for mofongo were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use container until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Pork and chicken was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by dead cockroach on sticky pad. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate pest problems. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The condensate from the prep unit refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
A pipe and towel were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils pots, pans, and bowls were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use any pots, pans, and bowls until they are properly cleaned and sanitized. 3-bay sink was set up at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Prep unit was observed held at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food in unit was observed between 60-50 DF. All food in unit was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Chicken, and chicharron was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed to eliminate mouse problem. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators, food containers, and shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The chest freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
Inspector observed rodent burrows in the back outside area.PCS arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (preps table shelves and prep units ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Handwashing in kitchen area was lacking hot water. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The refuse area located in back of establishment has an accumulation of litter, trash, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The floors and walls in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The (wall ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed a hole in the wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Heavy cream was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Working containers of various food product are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
Inspector observed knives being stored in between 3 bay sink and wall. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The 2 dr lowboy in the kitchen area is in poor repair(ambient 45 degrees Fahrenheit). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The walls in the back kitchen area is in poor repair(observed hole). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The reach in refrigerator gaskets is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
